title: PYL Ducky Set [MTR4]
description: (Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia) Klang Valley Integrated Transit's MRT Putrajaya Line - "Ducky" Hyundai Rotem Set!
body:
**A re-textured Hyundai Rotem R-train for the MRT Putrajaya Line - "Ducky" Hyundai Rotem Set!**

(Re-textured by AbsurdlySmrt)

Thanks for downloading my resource pack! Feel free to contact me for more details/improvement! Appreciate it! ~ AbsurdlySmrt

![A re-textured Hyundai Rotem R-train for the MRT Putrajaya Line - "Ducky" Hyundai Rotem Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u2L2kHV4/images/34dd6617cd845285f6777a315eb37a303af52d2f.png)

CONTENT:
=========================
A re-texture of the Hyundai Rotem R-train.

REQUIRED MINECRAFT MOD:
=========================
This Resource Pack **requires** the following:

[**Minecraft Transit Railway**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)
*Tested and worked on MTR4, may not work for MTR3.2.2. or below
